effortModel.citation: Keshav 2007: Pass1+2=65-70min/paper (practical PhD reading); Pass2 focused=120min; Pass3 full=300+min

expectedStrategy: 30-min Abstract scan first — 3-tier classification (Must-Read 5, Should-Read 5, Skim-Only 2)
alternatives: if quantitative-heavy: read tables/graphs first to orient before full text
if 12 papers not yet finalized: add 2-3 days for search + Pass 1 screening
hardFailChecks: must distinguish Pass levels (1/2/3) — not a single uniform min/paper
must recommend 3-tier classification before diving in
must NOT treat all 12 papers identically (uniform 120-180min each)
toneExpectation: systematic and collaborative; PhD context awareness; synthesis matrix suggestion as value-add
